channel.title: Serenity News Briefing
channel.description: Curated news briefings — Iran/war, AI/ML, fintech, NYC politics.

item.title: ESCALATION: Israel Hits Tehran Security HQ; Iran Strikes US Sites in Dubai & Qatar
item.description:
Major escalation. Israel attacks security headquarters across Tehran. Iran retaliates — drone fire at US consulate in Dubai, missile strike on US base in Qatar. Months of planning behind mission targeting Iran's supreme leader. Iran regime still intact but in crisis mode. US sending evacuation planes. Hezbollah drags Lebanon into war (52 killed in Israeli strikes). Tehran food shortages growing. Trump endgame unclear. Asia markets slump day 3, oil surging.

Sources: BBC News. 2026-03-04 evening.

item.title: Mamdani: ICE Meeting, NYPD Tensions, AI Deepfakes (Older Stories)
item.description: Columbia student freed after Mamdani-Trump meeting on ICE. Snowball fight incident puts Mamdani at odds with NYPD. AI-generated fake Mamdani-Epstein images debunked. Stories from late Feb/early Mar — no current coverage.

item.title: Briefing: March 4 AM — Iran 1,000+ Dead; 6 US KIA; Markets Day 3
item.description: Iran civilian toll passes 1,000. All 6 US KIA identified (Kuwait drone). Gulf states: "all red lines crossed." Hormuz standoff. Cyprus defenses bolstered. TikTok refuses E2E encryption. OpenAI military deal updated. Noem grilled at Senate. Commerce Sec testifying on Epstein.

item.title: March 3: Iran Strikes Begin — 787 Dead, First US Combat Deaths
item.description: US-Israel launch coordinated strikes on Iran. Civilian toll climbs from initial reports to 787+. First US soldiers killed in Kuwait drone strike (4+ confirmed). Gulf states hit by Iranian retaliation. Markets rattled.
